title: Top users by order count
description: Return the top 5 users by number of orders, with columns user_id and order_count. Include only users with at least 1 order. Order by order_count desc, then user_id asc.
expected_query:
SELECT u.user_id, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY order_count DESC, u.user_id ASC
LIMIT 5
solution_query:
SELECT u.user_id, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY order_count DESC, u.user_id ASC
LIMIT 5;
explanation: An INNER JOIN excludes users with zero orders. COUNT(order_id) counts orders per user; ORDER BY and LIMIT return the top 5.
hints: Use an INNER JOIN (JOIN) to exclude users with no orders.
